caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain for Barbados, Strong Winds Near St. Maarten
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing heavy tropical moisture with 100% rain probability, easterly winds near 16 kt and seas to 5.6 ft with an ESE swell at a 7 s period. I advise mariners to take precautions and avoid exposed waters near St. Maarten, where winds may reach 27 kt and conditions meet Small Craft Advisory criteria with increased chop and gusts.

mediterranean.headline: SW Swell and 24 kt Winds Impact Mykonos Waters
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing southwest winds of 24 kt with seas to 5.6 ft and a dominant 7 s SW swell, and less than 10% rain probability. I note Mykonos as the principal marine concern today while Lisbon remains light at 10 kt with generally calmer waters.
